Ladies and gentlemen, please take your seats, for we are turning a new, thrilling page in our grand saga of market interpretation. We have navigated the turbulent waters of "Trump's Manufactured Chaos," we've peered behind the curtain of "The Bear Market in Disguise," and we've deciphered the cryptic whispers of the "Holy Alliance 2.0." We even consulted the celestial bodies themselves with "Astrology as a Market Driver" and questioned our own reality during "The Artificial Stabilization."

comment.body: Alma’s premise: “The centroid falls to 6447.75 - 6452.75 range, it acts as a structural pivot after 12.40pm, it will decide (especially the 6450.29 line) if the spot will be pinned to 6460 or to 6440.” Well at 12:45 we just missed GAP FILL by .02 at 6466.89. So we were above the Centroid, but then continued a slide all afternoon to 6450 at 3:59, to close at 6440ish. I would of thought the quoted statement implied that after 12:40 if the market was below the (6444)centroid we would pin 6440, and if above centroid (6457) we would pin 6460?
comment.raw_body: Alma’s premise: “The centroid falls to 6447.75 - 6452.75 range, it acts as a structural pivot after 12.40pm, it will decide (especially the 6450.29 line) if the spot will be pinned to 6460 or to 6440.” Well at 12:45 we just missed GAP FILL by .02 at 6466.89.
